attestation.description: Optional Ed25519 attestation; required when STIGMEM_ATTESTATION_REQUIRED=true

derived_from.description: Source fact hashes/ids used for provenance-carrying summary writes.
derived_from.title: Derived From

garden_id.description: URI of the garden this fact belongs to (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL)
garden_id.title: Garden Id

write_mode.description: Write mode; summarize_with_provenance carries read-derived provenance.
write_mode.title: Write Mode

AttestationToken.description:
Ed25519 attestation proving the caller owns the registered agent key.

The signature covers the canonical UTF-8 message:
    "{entity}\n{relation}\n{value.type}\n{encoded_v}\n{source}"
where encoded_v is the same string the node derives via _encode_v().
AttestationToken.title: AttestationToken

DeferenceRule.description: When to defer to another entity before proceeding (Spec-X8-Intent-Envelope).
DeferenceRule.title: DeferenceRule

EscalationPolicy.description: Who to notify and how when escalation is required (Spec-X8-Intent-Envelope).
EscalationPolicy.title: EscalationPolicy

interpret_as.description: How the value may be interpreted by recall consumers.
interpret_as.title: Interpret As

HandoffArtifact.description: Named artifact reference passed along with a handoff (Spec-X8-Intent-Envelope).
HandoffArtifact.title: HandoffArtifact

HandoffPayload.description:
Structured context transfer for agent handoffs (Spec-X8-Intent-Envelope).

fact_refs MUST include any facts the receiver needs to reconstitute context.
HandoffPayload.title: HandoffPayload

fact_ids.description: IDs of all facts written into the fabric for this envelope
fact_ids.title: Fact Ids

IntentEnvelopeRequest.description:
POST /v1/intents request body (Spec-X8-Intent-Envelope).

The ``from`` field is aliased as ``from_uri`` in Python to avoid the keyword clash.
Clients MUST send the JSON key ``"from"``.

id.description: Optional client-generated intent ID (UUID). Auto-assigned when omitted.
id.title: Id

to.description: Target entity URIs (at least one required)
to.title: To

IntentEnvelopeRequest.title: IntentEnvelopeRequest

checks.description: Checks to run; omit for all
checks.title: Checks

entity.description: Restrict to a specific entity URI
entity.title: Entity

stale_lookahead_s.description: Also flag facts expiring within N seconds
stale_lookahead_s.title: Stale Lookahead S

ProvenanceEntry.description:
One entry in a fact's derived_from chain.

exists=False means the referenced entity is tombstoned or the fact is otherwise
inaccessible. Shape is identical in both cases so
callers cannot distinguish tombstone from unauthorized.
ProvenanceEntry.title: ProvenanceEntry

QuarantinePromoteRequest.description: POST /v1/gardens/:id/promote — move a quarantined fact to a target garden.

target_garden_id.description: Target garden UUID or slug. Null = promote to no-garden (main fabric).
target_garden_id.title: Target Garden Id

QuarantinePromoteRequest.title: QuarantinePromoteRequest

QuarantineRecord.description: Quarantined fact as returned by GET /v1/quarantine.
QuarantineRecord.title: QuarantineRecord

QuarantineRejectRequest.description: POST /v1/gardens/:id/reject — permanently reject a quarantined fact.
QuarantineRejectRequest.title: QuarantineRejectRequest

as_of.description: Time-travel query: return facts visible at this ISO 8601 timestamp (Spec-X3-Time-Travel-Queries)
as_of.title: As Of

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; omit for no expiry.
expires_at.title: Expires At

raw_key.description: Caller-generated raw key material (e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`). The node hashes it and never stores or echoes the raw value.
raw_key.title: Raw Key

tenant_id.description: Target tenant; defaults to the caller's tenant.
tenant_id.title: Tenant Id

target.description: Scope name (e.g. 'local') or entity URI to watch
target.title: Target

TombstoneNotice.description:
Tombstone metadata surfaced to admin callers on time-travel queries.

Covered by Spec-X3-Time-Travel-Queries.
TombstoneNotice.title: TombstoneNotice

info.description: Reference node implementing the Stigmem v0.9.0a2 HTTP API — facts, federation, gardens, recall, subscriptions, audit, identity, content-addressed fact IDs. Cross-cutting features (tombstones, time-travel, multi-tenant) are opt-in plugins.
info.title: Stigmem Reference Node

get.description:
Return node identity, auth mode, and federation capability advertisement.

Covered by Spec-03-HTTP-API.

schema.title: Response Node Metadata  Well Known Stigmem Get

get.description: Export the full audit log.  Requires ``audit.read`` capability.

parameters.description: Seq-based forward pagination cursor (exclusive lower bound)
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Seq-based forward pagination cursor (exclusive lower bound)
schema.title: Cursor

get.description: Return CID backfill progress for this node (Spec-21-Content-Addressed-IDs).
List registered entity aliases.

parameters.description: Return all aliases that resolve to this URI
parameters.name: canonical_uri

schema.description: Return all aliases that resolve to this URI
schema.title: Canonical Uri
Response List Aliases V1 Aliases Get

post.description: Register a user-defined semantic alias (raw_uri ≡ canonical_uri).

delete.description: Remove a user-defined alias. Migration aliases cannot be deleted via API.

get.description: Query enriched audit logs with optional principal and source filters.

parameters.description: true = attested only; false = unattested only
parameters.name: attested

schema.description: true = attested only; false = unattested only
schema.title: Attested

get.description: Export the enriched audit log as CSV for compliance (principal → key → fact).

parameters.description: true = attested only; false = unattested only
parameters.name: attested

schema.description: true = attested only; false = unattested only
schema.title: Attested

get.description: Return the complete enriched audit trail for a specific fact.

schema.title: Response Get Fact Audit V1 Audit Facts  Fact Id  Get

get.description: List all agent keys (active and revoked) for the caller's entity.

schema.title: Response List Agent Keys V1 Auth Agent Keys Get

post.description: Register an Ed25519 public key for source-attestation on fact assertions.

delete.description: Revoke an agent key. Callers may only revoke their own keys.

get.description: List all non-expired API keys belonging to the caller's entity_uri.

schema.title: Response List Keys V1 Auth Keys Get

post.description:
Register a caller-provided raw API key.

Mirrors the bootstrap CLI's posture: the caller supplies the raw key
material; the node hashes and stores it.  The endpoint requires the
caller to hold the ``admin`` capability — typically the bootstrap
key, or a previously-minted admin-scoped key.

The response NEVER echoes the raw key; the caller already has it.
post.summary: Register a caller-provided static API key (admin only).

get.description: List active API keys approaching expiry (admin only).

parameters.description: Return active keys expiring within this many days.
parameters.name: within_days

schema.description: Return active keys expiring within this many days.
schema.title: Within Days
Response List Expiring Keys V1 Auth Keys Expiring Soon Get

delete.description: Revoke a specific API key. Callers may only revoke their own keys.

post.description: Exchange an OIDC id_token for a scoped stigmem API key.

get.description:
Fetch the synthesized memory card for an entity (Spec-X11-Recall-Graph).

Returns 404 when the entity has no live facts.

parameters.description: Force refresh even if card is fresh
parameters.name: refresh

schema.description: Force refresh even if card is fresh
schema.title: Refresh
Response List Conflicts V1 Conflicts Get

post.description: Assert a canonical resolution fact and close the conflict (Spec-15-Fact-Semantics).

schema.title: Response Resolve Conflict V1 Conflicts  Conflict Id  Resolve Post

get.description: Poll the status of an async decay job (Spec-X9-Decay-Semantics).

schema.title: Response Get Decay Job V1 Decay Jobs  Job Id  Get

post.description:
Mark stale facts as expired. Cron-friendly one-shot sweeper.

Returns 200 synchronously for scopes ≤ threshold facts (Spec-X9-Decay-Semantics).
Returns 202 with job_id for larger scopes; poll GET /v1/decay/jobs/:job_id.
Note: dry_run is always synchronous per Spec-X9-Decay-Semantics.

parameters.description: Report what would be decayed without writing
parameters.name: dry_run

schema.description: Report what would be decayed without writing
schema.title: Dry Run

parameters.description: Expire non-expiring facts older than N seconds (0 = all)
parameters.name: ttl_seconds

schema.description: Expire non-expiring facts older than N seconds (0 = all)
schema.title: Ttl Seconds

parameters.description: Expire active facts below this confidence
parameters.name: min_confidence

schema.description: Expire active facts below this confidence
schema.title: Min Confidence
Response Decay Sweep V1 Decay Sweep Post

get.description:
Resolve a raw entity URI using 3-layer fuzzy resolution (Spec-01-Fact-Model).

Layer 1: canonical normalisation (case/whitespace collapse).
Layer 2: alias table lookup (explicit pre-registered mappings).
Layer 3: token-fuzzy scoring over entities of the same type prefix in the fact graph.

Returns the best resolved URI and scored candidates with match details.

parameters.description: Max Layer 3 fuzzy candidates to return
parameters.name: top_k

schema.description: Max Layer 3 fuzzy candidates to return
schema.title: Top K

parameters.description: Minimum fuzzy score threshold for Layer 3 candidates
parameters.name: threshold

schema.description: Minimum fuzzy score threshold for Layer 3 candidates
schema.title: Threshold
Response Resolve Entity Uri V1 Entities Resolve Get

get.description:
Query facts by pattern (Spec-03-HTTP-API).

Omitted fields are wildcards. Entity/source are normalized by Spec-01-Fact-Model.

parameters.description: Return facts with timestamp > this ISO 8601 value
parameters.name: after

schema.description: Return facts with timestamp > this ISO 8601 value
schema.title: After

parameters.description: Filter to facts in this garden (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL)
parameters.name: garden_id

schema.description: Filter to facts in this garden (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL)
schema.title: Garden Id

parameters.description: Time-travel query: return facts visible at this ISO 8601 timestamp (Spec-X3-Time-Travel-Queries)
parameters.name: as_of

schema.description: Time-travel query: return facts visible at this ISO 8601 timestamp (Spec-X3-Time-Travel-Queries)
schema.title: As Of

post.description:
Assert a fact into the fabric.

Covered by Spec-03-HTTP-API and Spec-01-Fact-Model. Normalizes
entity/source URIs on ingest.

get.description:
Retrieve a single fact by UUID or sha256: CID.

Covered by Spec-03-HTTP-API and Spec-21-Content-Addressed-IDs.

Provenance walk with tombstone suppression.

Returns the derived_from chain for a fact.  Any entry whose referenced entity is
tombstoned — or whose fact is otherwise inaccessible — is redacted to
{"hash": "...", "exists": false}, indistinguishable from unauthorized
cross-scope references to prevent existence leakage. Covered by
Spec-X2-RTBF-Tombstones and Spec-X11-Recall-Graph.

post.description:
Verify a fact's stored CID against a freshly computed one.

Covered by Spec-21-Content-Addressed-IDs.

schema.title: Response Get Audit Log V1 Federation Audit Get

post.description:
Issue a capability token.

C1: token subject must appear in the issuer's manifest entities list.
H1: issuer manifest must not be expired.
Nonce: 64-char lowercase hex enforced by DB CHECK constraint.

schema.title: Response Issue Capability Token V1 Federation Capability Tokens Post

post.description:
Verify a capability token (Spec-06-Capability-Tokens).

Returns {"valid": true} on success, or {"valid": false, "reason": "..."}
when the token fails any verification step (expired, bad sig, revoked, etc.).
HTTP 200 in both cases; 422 only for a missing/malformed request body.

schema.title: Response Verify Capability Token Endpoint V1 Federation Capability Tokens Verify Post

post.description: Revoke a capability token and submit a revocation notice to the TL.

schema.title: Response Revoke Capability Token V1 Federation Capability Tokens  Token Id  Revoke Post

get.description:
Return scope-filtered, HLC-cursor-paged facts to an authenticated peer.

Covered by Spec-05-Federation-Trust.

post.description:
Receive push-replicated facts from a peer. Off by default.

Auth (H-SEC-2): peer JWT first; if that fails and X-Stigmem-Capability is
present, fall through to capability-token verification.  Capability tokens
must carry verb=write and an object that covers all pushed fact scopes.
Covered by Spec-05-Federation-Trust.

schema.title: Response Push Facts V1 Federation Facts Push Post

put.description:
Publish or update an org manifest.

Rate-limited to 10 submissions per entity_uri per hour.
rotation_events arrays with > 100 entries are rejected.
TL submission is attempted; in strict mode TL failure → 503.

schema.title: Response Put Manifest V1 Federation Manifest Put

get.description: Resolve a peer manifest by entity_uri (URL-encoded or raw path).

schema.title: Response Get Manifest V1 Federation Manifest  Entity Uri Encoded  Get
Response List Peers V1 Federation Peers Get

post.description:
Register a peer.

Fetches its well-known doc and verifies declaration_sig
(Spec-05-Federation-Trust).
Approve a pending peer after out-of-band public-key confirmation.

get.description:
List accessible gardens (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL).

Node admins see all; others see only their gardens.

schema.title: Response List Gardens V1 Gardens Get

post.description: Create a new garden (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL). Creator is auto-added as admin.

delete.description:
Delete a garden (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL).

Requires garden admin role. Facts are orphaned, not deleted.
Quarantine gardens with pending facts cannot be deleted
(Spec-08-Quarantine-Garden; HTTP 409).

get.description: Get a garden by slug or UUID (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL).
List members of a garden (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL). Requires any member role.

schema.title: Response List Members V1 Gardens  Garden Slug Or Id  Members Get

post.description: Add a member to a garden (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL). Requires admin role.

delete.description: Remove a member from a garden (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL). Cannot remove last admin.

patch.description: Change a member's role (Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL). Requires admin.

post.description:
Promote a quarantined fact to a target garden (Spec-08-Quarantine-Garden).

Requires quarantine:moderator or admin role.

schema.title: Response Promote Fact V1 Gardens  Garden Slug Or Id  Promote Post

post.description:
Reject a quarantined fact (Spec-08-Quarantine-Garden).

Sets confidence = 0.0 and quarantine_status = 'rejected'.
Requires quarantine:moderator or admin role.

schema.title: Response Reject Fact V1 Gardens  Garden Slug Or Id  Reject Post

get.description: Return graph neighbors of entity within depth hops (Spec-X11-Recall-Graph).

post.description:
Submit an IntentEnvelope (Spec-X8-Intent-Envelope).

Validates the envelope, normalizes URIs, decomposes it into atomic facts,
and returns a receipt with the generated intent ID and all written fact IDs.
Idempotent when the caller supplies a stable ``id``: if that intent_id already
has a ``intent:goal`` fact in the fabric, returns 409 Conflict.

get.description:
Retrieve an IntentEnvelope by ID, reconstructed from its reified facts.

Covered by Spec-X8-Intent-Envelope.

post.description:
Health-check sweep for a scope (Spec-20-Lint-Semantics). Read-only.

Returns 200 with results synchronously for scopes ≤ threshold facts.
Returns 202 with job_id for larger scopes; poll GET /v1/lint/jobs/:job_id.

schema.title: Response Lint Scope V1 Lint Post

get.description: Poll the status of an async lint job (Spec-20-Lint-Semantics).

schema.title: Response Get Lint Job V1 Lint Jobs  Job Id  Get

get.description:
List facts in the quarantine system (Spec-08-Quarantine-Garden).

Node admins see all quarantined facts across all gardens.
Other callers see facts only in quarantine gardens where they hold a member role.

parameters.description: Filter by quarantine garden UUID or slug
parameters.name: garden_id

schema.description: Filter by quarantine garden UUID or slug
schema.title: Garden Id

parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, promoted, rejected
parameters.name: quarantine_status

schema.description: Filter by status: pending, promoted, rejected
schema.title: Quarantine Status

post.description:
Promote a quarantined fact to the main fabric (or a specific target garden).

Requires quarantine:moderator or admin role in the fact's quarantine garden.

schema.title: Response Admit Fact V1 Quarantine  Fact Id  Admit Post

post.description:
Permanently reject a quarantined fact.

Sets confidence = 0.0 and quarantine_status = 'rejected'.
Requires quarantine:moderator or admin role in the fact's quarantine garden.

schema.title: Response Reject Fact V1 Quarantine  Fact Id  Reject Post

post.description:
Hybrid recall — return the most salient facts for a query, within budget.

Combines lexical (FTS5/BM25), dense-vector, and graph-traversal signals.
Honors Spec-02-Scopes-and-ACL and Spec-05-Federation-Trust at every step.

parameters.description: Return the temporary legacy recall response shape without `content` / `instructions` channel fields.
parameters.name: legacy_format

schema.description: Return the temporary legacy recall response shape without `content` / `instructions` channel fields.
schema.title: Legacy Format

get.description:
Confidence-weighted summary of all facts in a scope (Phase 6).

Returns facts sorted by confidence descending, with contradiction flags and
freshness metadata for each fact, plus aggregate statistics.

schema.title: Response Synthesize Scope V1 Scopes  Scope  Synthesize Get

get.description: List the authenticated caller's subscriptions (BOLA: own only).

post.description:
Create a subscription (Spec-X7-Subscriptions).

subscriber_identity is always the caller (BOLA).

delete.description: Cancel a subscription (BOLA: only the owner may delete).

get.description: Get a subscription by ID (BOLA: returns 404 if caller does not own it).

Replay window: return delivery events for a subscription (Spec-X7-Subscriptions).

Results are bounded to the configured replay window (default 24 h).

parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp; return events created at or after this time
parameters.name: since

schema.description: ISO 8601 timestamp; return events created at or after this time
schema.title: Since
